title: Has anyone else seen this Kensuke garage kit
display_title: Has anyone else seen this Kensuke garage kit
wikitext:
[]: Has anyone else seen this Kensuke garage kit??             Quote Post by hatchergold » Sat Sep 25, 2021 6:45 pm Made an account here just to ask this because this is so baffling to me. I was looking through pictures of some eva garage kits and i found this picture I was shocked to see a kensuke garage kit, because ive never seen one!! He is my favorite eva character and i already have every figure of him lol. I couldn't find any more information about this figure, though. All of the other figures in the pic (besides hikari) are manufactured by kurushima from 1998-99 and sculpted by katayama hiroki. Part of me thinks the kensuke is a custom of some kind but the posing is too unique to any of the other plugsuits sculpted by hiroki. Im assuming kensuke was also done by him, since the style seems very similar. Ive searched high and low and this is the only picture of him ive found. (Kurushima also doesnt list any of their boy garage kits on their site, which is weird. I know for a fact kurushima made these because I have the toji) The watermark in the bottom now leads to some weird russian site, but it used to lead to a russian eva forum. Ive found the new url the forum uses and found the original upload of the picture, which is from 2010 and was uploaded by a serial reposter. Im assuming the figures arent his because of that. Anybody know where else to go from here? Has anyone else seen this?

[]: Re: Has anyone else seen this Kensuke garage kit??             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Sep 25, 2021 7:55 pm Did a few passes of reverse image searching, brought up nothing of relevance; I have some friends who are fairly on top of their garage kit game, I'm gonna shoot them a message, see if they know anything. For the time, the search phrases you're probably gonna want to look for are 相田ケンスケ ガレージキット / 相田ケンスケ レジン /相田ケンスケ ガレキ / 相田ケンスケ プラグスーツ (at least according to various modelling-adjacent places that I copypasted them from, my Japanese is pretty much nonexisting, so no guarantees). I ran it through a few sites that carry stuff like this myself, but a cursory search didn't bring up anything useful

[]: Re: Has anyone else seen this Kensuke garage kit??             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Sep 26, 2021 6:29 am aww, it's the whole set. (sans Mari, who presumably wasn't invented yet) The girls look kind of off though, like the eyes are too big. The Touji one is pretty good tho

[]: Re: Has anyone else seen this Kensuke garage kit??             Quote Post by hatchergold » Sun Sep 26, 2021 9:01 pm Kendrix wrote: (sans Mari, who presumably wasn't invented yet) The girls look kind of off though, like the eyes are too big. The Touji one is pretty good tho

[]: Re: Has anyone else seen this Kensuke garage kit??             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Sep 26, 2021 11:02 pm My personal guess is that Kensuke is a custom build from probably before 2003 because that's when Girlfriend of Steel 2 came out and Kensuke got his official plug suit which was bright yellow. The dark green top of the plugsuit is also very much the color scheme you see in some of the photo's of the Kurushima Touji kit, like the ones in the Eva Figure Archive book and Replicant Vol 1 hatchergold wrote: he was custom you think the person who did it would post about it online to show off their work!!!)
